summary: Make runtime service ownership and artifact lifecycle metadata explicit for production readiness.
rationale: This slice introduces a RuntimeServices bundle and a path-free artifact lifecycle reference so production results can expose artifact availability and deletion metadata without leaking local debug paths.
verification: uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: implicit runtime service construction scattered across WorkflowRuntime attributes
production artifact references that imply local filesystem debug paths
artifact lifecycle metadata hidden behind private artifact policy internals
risks: Existing debug APIs must continue to expose local run_dir and trace_log_path for CLI, TUI, and local workflows.
Later runtime slices must add core commit receipts, source degradation semantics, and constraint decisions without overloading the lifecycle reference.
